# NourishAI

> AI-powered nutrition tracking for fitness-focused people

NourishAI helps gym-goers, macro trackers, and athletes track their nutrition effortlessly using AI-powered food photo analysis.

## Features

- Snap a photo of your food for instant macro breakdown (calories, protein, carbs, fat)
- Barcode scanner for packaged foods
- Manual food entry
- Daily macro tracking dashboard with ring progress views
- Apple HealthKit integration
- Apple Watch companion app
- iOS Widgets
- Water intake tracking
- Weight and progress trends
- AI-powered food analysis via Claude vision

## Pricing

- Free: 1 AI scan per week, manual entry, barcode scanner, HealthKit
- Pro ($7.99/mo or $39.99/yr): Unlimited AI scans, saved meals, analytics, Watch app, water tracking

## Links

- Website: https://nourishai.app
